variants.title: WX470
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WX470. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WX470 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Media: Synthetic Polyester, Efficiency 1: 5µ, Outer Diameter: 134.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 91.5 mm, Length: 72.0 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ, Media Type: Synthetic Polyester, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Seal: Nitrile

Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: WX470
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0005 L 003 P Breather Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WX470
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0005 L 003 P Breather Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
